name: agentmesh
description: Sync the current workspace to AgentMesh and open the workspace in the browser.

agentmesh.apiBaseUrl.description: AgentMesh web base URL (no trailing slash). Overrides optional repo-root .agentmesh.json if empty.

agentmesh.workspaceId.description: Workspace id from the web console. Usually set via .agentmesh.json.

agentmesh.contextToken.description: Optional workspace Bearer token. Prefer AgentMesh: Sign in with Browser to store the token in VS Code Secret Storage instead of writing it here.

agentmesh.projectId.description: Optional cloud Project id to overwrite on each sync. First sync may create one and write it back into .agentmesh.json if present.

agentmesh.syncOnSave.description: After saving a file, debounce and sync the workspace folder to AgentMesh (same as Sync command).

agentmesh.syncOnSaveDebounceMs.description: Milliseconds to wait after the last save before auto-sync (when syncOnSave is on).

commands.title: AgentMesh: Sign in with Browser (device code)
AgentMesh: Push to Cloud (Sync Current Folder)
